markdownRemark.html:
From: https://www.hanselman.com/blog/F7IsTheGreatestPowerShellHotkeyThatNoOneUsesAnyMoreWeMustFixThis.aspx

Did you also know that PSReadline logs all your commands to disk by default? Have a look at it: notepad (Get-PSReadLineOption).HistorySavePath After this you’ll think twice before copy-pasting plain-text secrets into the console…
